---
title: "Alina Bolshakova"
image: images/profile1.jpg
about:
  template: broadside
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alina-bolshakova/
      target: _blank
    - text: "{{< fa brands github-alt >}} GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/AyaBlck
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:alinabolshakovaa@gmail.com
---

Welcome to my portfolio! Here you will find my projects, research, and insights at the intersection of finance and data science.

[Learn more about me →](about.qmd)
